title: Spicy Velvety Slovakian Peppers Stir-fry
description: This low-calorie-friendly date-night dish features a spicy, velvety flavor profile using barbeque sauce and pressure-cooking for convenience.
instructions: Preheat your pressure cooker to high heat.
Trim the tops of the bell peppers, and cut into strips or dice. Keep the seeds for extra flavor.
In a bowl, mix together chili flakes, chopped basil leaves, barbeque sauce, oyster sauce, soy sauce, and a little bit of water until smooth. Adjust seasoning as needed.
Add vegetable oil to your pressure cooker, followed by the bell peppers, and stir-fry for about 2-3 minutes until slightly softened.
Pour the mixed sauce over the vegetables in the pot. Seal with the lid and cook on high heat for about 10-15 minutes until cooked through.
Let the pressure release naturally before carefully opening the cooker to serve.
